Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
219 
PARENT_ORGANIZATION 
LABEL: 
Part D Plan Parent Organization Name 
DESCRIPTION: This variable is the name of the parent organization for the Part D plan, if applicable. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: PARENT_ORGANIZATION 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
50 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
text description 
COMMENT: 
This is the name of the parent organization associated with the Part D
